# Return Note Template

Status: Candidate / Template / No Runtime

```yaml
Return_Note:
  Gate:
  Scope:
  Source:
  Carrier:
  Authority:
  Files_Read: []
  Files_Changed: []
  Evidence_Registry: []
  Facts: []
  Inferences: []
  To_Verify: []
  What_Changed: []
  What_Did_Not_Change: []
  Risks: []
  Pending_Human_Decision: []
  Next_Action:
```

## Rule

Every returned claim should point to evidence where possible. This note is review material, not closeout.
